gold.title: Glassmorphism Sidebar
gold.reason: Full glassmorphism-styled sidebar with page routing, rich content panels, and a striking frosted-glass aesthetic — immediately elevates any modern website or SaaS landing experience.

gold.title: Sidebar
gold.reason: Animated sidebar with framer-motion AnimatePresence, custom hamburger toggle, and icon-driven minimal nav — clean, modern, and directly usable as a site-level side navigation.

gold.title: Sidebar
gold.reason: Aceternity-style sidebar with AnimatePresence transitions, context-driven open/close, and Next.js Link integration — polished, production-quality, and recognisably premium.

gold.title: Modern Side Bar
gold.reason: Feature-complete animated sidebar with collapse/expand, search, notifications, and dark/light transitions — visually rich and immediately deployable on real customer sites.

silver.title: Sidebar
silver.reason: Animated sidebar with ScrollArea, badges, framer-motion, and a polished hierarchy — well-built and attractive but structured around an app/learning platform context.

silver.title: Sidebar
silver.reason: Clean collapsible sidebar with toggle, icon links, and basic sections — functional and clear, good quality but visually standard without strong differentiation.

silver.title: Sidebar
silver.reason: shadcn full sidebar primitive with variants, mobile support, and CVA — extremely well-engineered and accessible, but a headless building block rather than a distinctive visual component.

silver.title: Dashboard With Collapsible Sidebar
silver.reason: Collapsible sidebar paired with a full dashboard layout, dark/light mode, and rich icon nav — good quality but tightly coupled to a dashboard shell, limiting drop-in use.

silver.title: Sidebar Component
silver.reason: Comprehensive sidebar with search, deep nav tree, and multiple icon sections — clean and functional but heavily app/dashboard-oriented in structure.

bronze.title: Chat Template
bronze.reason: Chat application sidebar shell — domain-specific messaging UI, not applicable as a general website or marketing site navigation component.

bronze.title: Whatsapp Sidebar
bronze.reason: WhatsApp-style messaging sidebar — highly app-specific, clones a messaging product UI, no value for general website redesign.

bronze.title: Announcement
bronze.reason: Tooltip-wrapped announcement banner component — miscategorised as a sidebar; it is a notification/banner utility with no navigation function.
